-"""# Taipy

Welcome to the Taipy documentation.

This is the main package that provides the necessary classes to build
user interface, data processing pipelines, or complete multi-modal
applications.

## Sub-packages

- [taipy.config](config/overview.md): Configuration handling.
- [taipy.core](core/overview.md): Core package for Taipy.
- [taipy.doc](doc/overview.md): Documentation package.
- [taipy.gui](gui/overview.md): Graphical User Interface package.
- [taipy.rest](rest/overview.md): REST API package.
- [taipy.orchestrator](orchestrator/overview.md): Orchestrator package.
- [taipy.plots](plots/overview.md): Plots package.
- [taipy.scheduler](scheduler/overview.md): Scheduler package.
- [taipy.enterprise](enterprise/overview.md): Enterprise edition package.

## Usage

```python
from taipy import Gui, Core, ...
```

## Main classes

- [Gui](../gui/Api.md#taipy.gui.Gui) class to build the Web application.
- [Core](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.Core) class to orchestrate the execution of the pipelines.
- [DataNode](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.DataNode) class to manage data.
- [Task](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.Task) class to represent a function.
- [Pipeline](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.Pipeline) class to orchestrate the execution of tasks.
- [Scenario](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.Scenario) class to manage business problems.

## Sub-modules

### config

- [taipy.config.Config](../config/Api.md#taipy.config.Config) class to configure the application.
- [taipy.config.Configured](../config/Api.md#taipy.config.Configured) class to configure the application.
- [taipy.config.Section](../config/Api.md#taipy.config.Section) class to represent a configuration section.
- [taipy.config.ForeachConfig](../config/Api.md#taipy.config.ForeachConfig) class to represent a configuration for a foreach.

### core

- [taipy.core.cycle.CycleManager](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.cycle.CycleManager) class to manage cycles.
- [taipy.core.data.CsvDataNode](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.data.CsvDataNode) class to manage CSV data.
- [taipy.core.data.DataNode](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.data.DataNode) class to manage data.
- [taipy.core.data.InMemoryDataNode](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.data.InMemoryDataNode) class to manage data in memory.
- [taipy.core.data.PickleDataNode](../core/Api.md#taipy.core.data.PickleDataNode) class to manage data in pickle.
